caption:
What if the most liberating thing you could do today was simply stop explaining yourself?

Blamage — the fragrance that wears its name like a badge of honour. Created by Alessandro Gualtieri, one of the most radical noses working today, this extrait de parfum doesn't ask for permission. It arrives with fists raised, unapologetic and alive, like the feeling of a new season finally clicking into place.

Fragrance: @nasomatto

Only at Blink
